# n-dx

> Codebase analysis generated by Sourcevision.
> When using this document: group related items together and separate unrelated concerns.

## Project Overview

- **Files**: 712
- **Lines of code**: 211,453
- **Languages**: TypeScript (590), CSS (35), JSON (26), Other (22), JavaScript (19)
- **Zones**: 11 (11 with descriptions)
- **Git**: feature/from-recommend @ 536ec50
- **Analyzed**: 2026-02-21T02:06:09.507Z

## Architecture Zones

### Adaptive Web Gateway (`adaptive-web-gateway`)

Runs the HTTP server, adaptive routing, and MCP-facing gateways that serve schema-backed data to clients.

- Files: 53
- Cohesion: 0.99, Coupling: 0.01
- Entry points: packages/web/src/schema/data-files.ts
- Detail: `.sourcevision/zones/adaptive-web-gateway/context.md`

### Claude API Client Core (`claude-api-client-core`)

Typed client, CLI provider, and auth/config helpers that encapsulate how Claude is called from local tools.

- Files: 28
- Cohesion: 1.00, Coupling: 0.00
- Detail: `.sourcevision/zones/claude-api-client-core/context.md`

### Hench Agent Engine (`hench-agent-engine`)

Primary agent lifecycle, analysis pipelines, and tool integrations driving the automation runtime.

- Files: 100
- Cohesion: 0.97, Coupling: 0.03
- Entry points: packages/hench/src/process/index.ts, packages/hench/src/schema/v1.ts, packages/hench/src/tools/rex.ts, packages/hench/src/tools/shell.ts
- Detail: `.sourcevision/zones/hench-agent-engine/context.md`

### Completion Validation Bridge (`hench-completion-validation`)

Bridges agent completion logic with validation utilities and tests to enforce output correctness.

- Files: 5
- Cohesion: 0.55, Coupling: 0.45
- Entry points: packages/hench/src/validation/completion.ts
- Detail: `.sourcevision/zones/hench-completion-validation/context.md`

### Guardrail Enforcement Layer (`hench-guardrails-layer`)

Command/policy/contract utilities plus tests that protect shell and process tools through guard definitions.

- Files: 10
- Cohesion: 0.79, Coupling: 0.21
- Entry points: packages/hench/src/guard/contracts.ts, packages/hench/src/guard/index.ts, packages/hench/src/guard/paths.ts
- Detail: `.sourcevision/zones/hench-guardrails-layer/context.md`

### Hosted Model Access Toolkit (`hosted-model-access`)

Provides the shared configuration, authentication, and invocation helpers that every Codex-facing LLM adapter consumes.

- Files: 34
- Cohesion: 1.00, Coupling: 0.00
- Detail: `.sourcevision/zones/hosted-model-access/context.md`

### Rex PRD Management CLI (`packages-rex:rex-cli`)

A self-contained CLI tool and MCP server for managing hierarchical product requirements documents, including code analysis, tree operations, validation, persistence, and AI-agent workflow integration.

- Files: 36
- Cohesion: 1.00, Coupling: 0.00
- Detail: `.sourcevision/zones/packages-rex:rex-cli/context.md`

### Cli (`packages-sourcevision:cli`)

12 files, primarily TypeScript

- Files: 12
- Cohesion: 0.74, Coupling: 0.26
- Entry points: packages/sourcevision/src/cli/commands/constants.ts, packages/sourcevision/src/cli/commands/init.ts, packages/sourcevision/src/cli/errors.ts, packages/sourcevision/src/cli/output.ts
- Detail: `.sourcevision/zones/packages-sourcevision:cli/context.md`

### Tests (`packages-sourcevision:tests`)

66 files, primarily TypeScript

- Files: 68
- Cohesion: 0.94, Coupling: 0.06
- Entry points: packages/sourcevision/src/cli/commands/analyze.ts, packages/sourcevision/src/cli/mcp.ts, packages/sourcevision/src/export/pdf-report.ts, packages/sourcevision/src/schema/data-files.ts, packages/sourcevision/src/schema/index.ts (+1 more)
- Detail: `.sourcevision/zones/packages-sourcevision:tests/context.md`

### Unified CLI Surface (`root-cli-surface`)

Small entrypoint cluster that wires ci/cli/web frontends through shared config and helpers.

- Files: 6
- Cohesion: 1.00, Coupling: 0.00
- Detail: `.sourcevision/zones/root-cli-surface/context.md`

### Viewer & Schema Experience (`viewer-schema-surface`)

Owns the v1 schema definitions, validation utilities, and the full viewer component library that renders those datasets in the UI.

- Files: 137
- Cohesion: 1.00, Coupling: 0.00
- Detail: `.sourcevision/zones/viewer-schema-surface/context.md`

## Route Structure

### Server API Routes

**/api/hench/adaptive/** (handleAdaptiveRoute) — `packages/web/src/server/routes-adaptive.ts`

```
DELETE  /api/hench/adaptive/override/:key
GET     /api/hench/adaptive/analysis
GET     /api/hench/adaptive/history
GET     /api/hench/adaptive/settings
POST    /api/hench/adaptive/apply
POST    /api/hench/adaptive/dismiss/:id
POST    /api/hench/adaptive/lock/:key
POST    /api/hench/adaptive/override
POST    /api/hench/adaptive/settings
POST    /api/hench/adaptive/unlock/:key
```

**/api/ndx-config** (handleConfigRoute) — `packages/web/src/server/routes-config.ts`

```
GET     /api/ndx-config
GET     /api/projects
POST    /api/projects/switch
```

**/api/features** (handleFeaturesRoute) — `packages/web/src/server/routes-features.ts`

```
GET     /api/features
PUT     /api/features
```

**/api/hench/** (handleHenchRoute) — `packages/web/src/server/routes-hench.ts`

```
DELETE  /api/hench/templates/:id
GET     /api/hench/audit
GET     /api/hench/config
GET     /api/hench/execute/status
GET     /api/hench/execute/status/:taskId
GET     /api/hench/runs
GET     /api/hench/runs/:id
GET     /api/hench/runs/health
GET     /api/hench/templates
GET     /api/hench/templates/:id
POST    /api/hench/execute
POST    /api/hench/execute/:taskId/terminate
POST    /api/hench/runs/:id/mark-stuck
POST    /api/hench/templates
POST    /api/hench/templates/:id/apply
PUT     /api/hench/config
```

### Components: 5 total, 0 usage edges

## Findings

### Anti-patterns

- God function: App in packages/web/src/viewer/main.ts calls 43 unique functions — consider decomposing into smaller, focused functions [warning]
- God function: generatePdfReport in packages/sourcevision/src/export/pdf-report.ts calls 38 unique functions — consider decomposing into smaller, focused functions [warning]

### Relationships

- Tightly coupled modules: packages/web/src/server/routes-rex.ts and packages/web/src/server/types.ts — 129 cross-file calls (unidirectional). Consider extracting shared interface or merging [info]

### Observations

- High cohesion (0.99) — files are tightly interconnected [info] (adaptive-web-gateway)
- Add runtime health checks in `server/index.ts` or `routes-adaptive.ts` to surface MCP dependency failures before they cascade to clients. [info] (adaptive-web-gateway)
- Factor the logic in `server/domain-gateway.ts` into explicit integration boundaries to make external service mocks simpler for tests. [info] (adaptive-web-gateway)
- Keep exporting shared dataset metadata through `schema/data-files.ts` so both the CLI and server stay in lockstep on file contracts. [info] (adaptive-web-gateway)
- High cohesion (1) — files are tightly interconnected [info] (claude-api-client-core)
- Add integration smoke tests for cli-provider.ts and exec.ts to detect incompatible streaming or error shapes early. [info] (claude-api-client-core)
- Centralize JSON/help-format helpers around one serialization contract to prevent CLI/API drift. [info] (claude-api-client-core)
- Harden config/auth validation so create-client.ts cannot be instantiated without explicit key scope and rate-limits. [info] (claude-api-client-core)
- Bidirectional coupling: "hench-agent-engine" ↔ "hench-guardrails-layer" (5+3 crossings) — consider extracting shared interface [warning]
- Size imbalance: largest zone has 137 files vs smallest with 5 — uneven decomposition [info]
- ... and 25 more

### Suggestions

- Hub function: walkTree in packages/rex/src/core/tree.ts is called from 20 files (high fan-in expected for this module type) — changes here have wide impact, consider if responsibilities can be narrowed [info]
- 3 potentially unused exports in packages/web/src/viewer/utils.ts have no incoming calls: getZoneColor, buildFlowEdges, buildFlowNodes [info]
- 2 potentially unused exports in packages/claude-client/src/exec.ts have no incoming calls: getCurrentBranch, isExecutableOnPath [info]
- Potentially unused export: simpleGlobMatch in packages/hench/src/shared/glob.ts has no incoming calls — verify if still needed [info]
